feed.title: Dr. Pritam Deka — News & Weekly AI Digest

entry.title: Paper Accepted at ACM SAC 2026
entry.summary: Our work on "Structured Extraction from Business Process Diagrams Using Vision-Language Models" has been accepted for presentation at ACM SAC 2026.

entry.title: Co-Founded Khyontek AI
entry.summary: Co-founded Khyontek AI (Guwahati, Assam) as Co-Founder & AI Product Lead, building SME-focused AI products and leading product strategy, fundraising preparation and an AI internship programme.

entry.title: Vision and Language Symposium Speaker
entry.summary: Main speaker at the Vision and Language Symposium 2025 held at Queen's University Belfast.

entry.title: PhD Completed
entry.summary: Successfully defended PhD thesis on "Evidence-Based Approach to Verification of Online Health-Related Content" at Queen's University Belfast.

entry.title: Started as Research Fellow at QUB
entry.summary: Joined Queen's University Belfast as a Research Fellow in AI, focusing on corporate document understanding with LLMs and VLMs.
